RUN if [ "$OPENJ9_SCC" = "true" ]; then populate_scc.sh; fi     && rm -rf /output/messaging /output/resources/security /logs/* $WLP_OUTPUT_DIR/.classCache     && chown -R 1001:0 /opt/ol/wlp/output     && chmod -R g+rwx /opt/ol/wlp/output
